race.description: Lightning Ridge Bowlo/Walgett Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: SPLASH OF STEEL (6) finds his race today third-up. Savaged the line with the 59kg for a narrow second over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Gets the gun run and will take holding out over the 1400m. MR BOHEMIAN (14) improving gelding who found the line nicely second-up for a tough third over 1300m at Scone. Can race a touch closer from the inside gate and figure prominently. TOKE (7) deep into the prep and will appreciate the firmer surface. Safely held when third over 1300m at Dubbo in a Super Mdn on the heavy (9) surface. Maps well and sure to be about the money. NORTHERN EAGLE (4) ran a better race last start when he warmed up late to secure fourth over 1200m at this track on a heavy (9) surface. Place best.
